record.field: working_days = inputs.WORKING_DAYS.amount if (inputs.WORKING_DAYS and inputs.WORKING_DAYS.amount > 0) else 30.0 absent_days = inputs.ABSENT_DAYS.amount if inputs.ABSENT_DAYS else 0.0 result = -(contract.wage / working_days * absent_days)

working_days = inputs.WORKING_DAYS.amount if (inputs.WORKING_DAYS and inputs.WORKING_DAYS.amount > 0) else 30.0 overflow_minutes = inputs.PERMISSION_OVERFLOW.amount if inputs.PERMISSION_OVERFLOW else 0.0 day_rate = contract.wage / working_days minute_rate = day_rate / 540.0 result = -(minute_rate * overflow_minutes)
